testcase.classname: contributionSnapshotSync shouldSyncPostBySnapshot marks changed when no baseline exists
testcase.name: contributionSnapshotSync shouldSyncPostBySnapshot marks changed when no baseline exists

testcase.classname: contributionSnapshotSync shouldSyncPostBySnapshot marks changed when latest snapshot is newer than baseline
testcase.name: contributionSnapshotSync shouldSyncPostBySnapshot marks changed when latest snapshot is newer than baseline

testcase.classname: contributionSnapshotSync shouldSyncPostBySnapshot marks unchanged when latest snapshot is older or equal to baseline
testcase.name: contributionSnapshotSync shouldSyncPostBySnapshot marks unchanged when latest snapshot is older or equal to baseline

testcase.classname: contributionSnapshotSync resolveSnapshotErrorStrategy falls back to legacy on auth-like errors
testcase.name: contributionSnapshotSync resolveSnapshotErrorStrategy falls back to legacy on auth-like errors

testcase.classname: contributionSnapshotSync resolveSnapshotErrorStrategy treats non-auth errors as changed post only
testcase.name: contributionSnapshotSync resolveSnapshotErrorStrategy treats non-auth errors as changed post only

testcase.classname: contributionSnapshotSync runContributionSyncWithFallback snapshot path only fetches changed posts and keeps unchanged skipped
testcase.name: contributionSnapshotSync runContributionSyncWithFallback snapshot path only fetches changed posts and keeps unchanged skipped

testcase.classname: contributionSnapshotSync runContributionSyncWithFallback falls back to legacy when auth-like history error appears
testcase.name: contributionSnapshotSync runContributionSyncWithFallback falls back to legacy when auth-like history error appears

testcase.classname: contributionSnapshotSync builds snapshot observability log with fixed fields
testcase.name: contributionSnapshotSync builds snapshot observability log with fixed fields

testcase.classname: notionHistoryApi parseLatestSnapshotMeta parses first snapshot timestamp string into timestampMs
testcase.name: notionHistoryApi parseLatestSnapshotMeta parses first snapshot timestamp string into timestampMs

testcase.classname: notionHistoryApi parseLatestSnapshotMeta returns null for empty snapshots
testcase.name: notionHistoryApi parseLatestSnapshotMeta returns null for empty snapshots

testcase.classname: notionHistoryApi isNotionHistoryAuthLikeError detects auth-like errors by status
testcase.name: notionHistoryApi isNotionHistoryAuthLikeError detects auth-like errors by status

testcase.classname: notionHistoryApi isNotionHistoryAuthLikeError detects auth-like errors by message
testcase.name: notionHistoryApi isNotionHistoryAuthLikeError detects auth-like errors by message
